purpose: Support heavy radial loads in spindle system with rolling contact fatigue resistance and lubrication management

inputs.name: lubrication_film
inputs.description: Lubrication film volume per bearing from flow path

states.name: bearing_fatigue_life
states.description: Bearing fatigue life degradation from radial clearance deviation and cyclic loading

states.name: grease_condition_degradation
states.description: Grease condition degradation accumulation from brass cage wear and contamination

states.name: cage_material_wear
states.description: Cage material degradation accumulation under severe operating conditions

states.name: lubrication_effectiveness
states.description: Lubrication effectiveness tracking based on film thickness adequacy

events.name: flaking_one_side_raceway
events.description: Flaking on one side of the raceway of radial bearing due to fatigue

events.name: scoring_raceway_rolling_surface
events.description: Scoring or smearing between raceway and rolling surface due to lubrication breakdown

events.name: rib_scoring
events.description: Scoring or smearing between the end face of the rollers and guide rib

events.name: excessive_preload
events.description: Excessive bearing preload leading to seizure from combined fatigue and cage wear

events.name: cage_noise
events.description: Cage noise in grease lubricated bearings indicating maintenance need

parameters.name: fatigue_life_hours
parameters.description: Expected fatigue life under normal conditions

parameters.name: radial_load_factor
parameters.description: Radial load multiplication factor for fatigue degradation

parameters.name: cage_wear_rate
parameters.description: Rate of cage material wear accumulation

state_transition_logic: bearing_fatigue_life decreases by (1/fatigue_life_hours) * radial_load_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
grease_condition_degradation increases by grease_degradation_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
cage_material_wear increases by cage_wear_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
lubrication_effectiveness approaches target using lubrication_response_coeff * (target - current) * dt where target = min(1.0, lubrication_film / optimal_film_thickness), clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
event_logic: scoring_raceway_rolling_surface occurs when lubrication_effectiveness < lubrication_failure_threshold OR grease_condition_degradation > grease_degradation_threshold
rib_scoring occurs when cage_material_wear > cage_wear_warning_threshold OR lubrication_effectiveness < lubrication_failure_threshold
excessive_preload occurs when bearing_fatigue_life < fatigue_failure_threshold AND cage_material_wear > cage_wear_failure_threshold
cage_noise occurs when grease_condition_degradation > grease_degradation_threshold OR cage_material_wear > cage_wear_warning_threshold
assumptions: Radial load factor remains constant during operation
Grease degradation occurs at steady rate independent of load
Cage wear accumulates linearly with time under normal conditions
Lubrication effectiveness responds to film thickness with first-order dynamics
Bearing operates under typical spindle radial loading conditions
Temperature effects on lubrication are captured in the film thickness input
